title: NBA-SBL Closing Gong Ceremony
description: NBA-SBL during a Closing Gong Ceremony in commemoration of its 17th Annual Business Law Conference themed “The Nigerian Business Landscape: Priorities for Law, Policy & Regulation at the Exchange
html: NBA-SBL during a Closing Gong Ceremony in commemoration of its 17th Annual Business Law Conference themed “The Nigerian Business Landscape: Priorities for Law, Policy & Regulation at the Exchange on Tuesday, July 4, 2023 in Lagos.
